title: Add logging to silent exception handlers in scheduler core and execution
description: Finding 1 from technical debt analysis (B-14862851). In scheduler/core.py:398-399, _dep_is_done() catches all exceptions and returns False with no logging — a broken dependency lookup silently misroutes beads. In scheduler/execution.py:299-300, the equivalent pattern silently skips broken dependency resolution via bare continue. Fix: replace bare except/return-False patterns with logger.warning calls that include the exception and bead context. Append a dependency_resolution_error event to execution_history when dependency lookup fails, so operators have an audit trail.
